    "Stop work immediately",
    "Loosen all fasteners in the reverse sequence",
    "Inspect fasteners, gaskets, and mating surfaces for damage or deformation",

  "rationale": "The technician violated the mandatory torque sequence pattern (spiral/star from center) during assembly. Incorrect torque sequencing can cause uneven clamping force, gasket pinching, component warping, and joint failure. The fasteners must be backed off, inspected, and retorqued correctly before work can proceed.",

    "OEM/engineering specs"
  ]
